caption: Role Management
description: Role Management events report lifecycle management of a role, as well as privileges, policies, credentials, and resources associated with the role. There are two ways updates to the state of a role may be expressed: Using the Update activity, for example when updating multiple items at one time, the updated_role reflects the changes made to iam_role. Using discrete activities, such as Assign Privileges the state change is expressed by the privileges attribute. Optionally, on success, the updated_role reflects the new state of the role. Roles assigned or removed from users and groups are expressed by the User Mangagement and Group Management classes.
name: role_management

1.caption: Create
1.description: Create a role. Use iam_role as the role to be created.

2.caption: Update
2.description: Update a role. The updated role details should be populated in the updated_role attribute.

3.caption: Delete
3.description: Delete a role. Use iam_role as the role to be deleted.

4.caption: Assign Privileges
4.description: Assign privileges to a role. Use privileges to be assigned to iam_role.

5.caption: Remove Privileges
5.description: Remove privileges from a role. Use privileges to be removed from iam_role.

6.caption: Assign Resources
6.description: Assign resources to a role. Use resources to be assigned to iam_role.

7.caption: Remove Resources
7.description: Remove resources from a role. Use resources to be removed from iam_role.

8.caption: Attach Policies
8.description: Attach one or more policies to a role. Use policies to be attached to iam_role.

9.caption: Detach Policies
9.description: Detach one or more policies from a role. Use policies to be detached from iam_role.

10.caption: Add Programmatic Credentials
10.description: Add credentials to a role. Use programmatic_credentials to be added to iam_role.

11.caption: Remove Programmatic Credentials
11.description: Remove credentials from a role. Use programmatic_credentials to be removed from iam_role.

policies.description: Details about the IAM policies associated with the Attach/Detach Policy activities.

privileges.description: A list of privileges assigned to or removed from iam_role.

programmatic_credentials.description: Details about the programmatic credential (API keys, access tokens, certificates, etc) associated with the role.

updated_role.description: The intended state of the iam_role after the update. On Success, represents the actual post-update state.
